title: caucalis scabra
intro: Caucalis scabra, also known as rough-hairy barbed-celery or rough-hairy wild celery, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Caucalis scabra include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Caucalis scabra is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used as a dried herb or tincture for various health remedies.
